caption: The video features an individual standing at a podium, delivering a speech. The person is dressed in traditional attire, consisting of a white kurta and vest, and is wearing glasses. They are gesturing with their left hand while speaking into a microphone, indicating an emphasis on certain points being made. The background consists of a textured wall with a geometric pattern, and there is a decorative element to the right of the speaker, which appears to be a tall, slender structure with red flowers at its base. The setting suggests a formal event or address, possibly of political or cultural significance.
